sections.text: ✦ AL KHOBAR · SINCE 2018 Excellence is our only title. Ten specialty departments. One quiet roof. One standard. Dermatology, plastic surgery, cosmetic dentistry, OB/GYN, paediatrics, bariatric and more — on Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Road in Al Khobar, since 2018. sections.heading: ✦ Ten departments. One promise.
sections.text: ✦ TEN DEPARTMENTS. ONE PROMISE. Everything you need, under one roof. Ten integrated specialty departments led by named clinicians. From dermatology to maxillofacial surgery to women's health — your visit covers the family. Dermatology & Laser № 01 Medical and cosmetic dermatology — acne, pigmentation, vascular, laser hair removal, anti-aging. LEARN MORE → Plastic & Aesthetic Surgery № 02 Maxillofacial, body contouring, and aesthetic surgical procedures — by board-certified surgeons. LEARN MORE → Cosmetic Dentistry № 03 Smile design, veneers, Hollywood smile, whitening — restoring teeth and confidence together. LEARN MORE →

sections.heading: Care held to astandard, not a trend.
sections.text: HOW WE WORK Chapter III. THE CARE Care held to a standard, not a trend. Every treatment we offer must be safe, effective, and beautiful. That rule has not changed since day one. I. Consultation with the relevant specialist II. A written plan, backed by diagnostics III. Regular follow-up, never rushed IV. Cross-department coordination when needed LEARN HOW WE WORK

sections.heading: Real change,documented with words and time.
sections.text: Chapter IV. THE JOURNEY Real change, documented with words and time. Saudi privacy by default — we publish the journey, not the face. Time-anchored testimonials from real patients at our Khobar clinic. We show the journey, not the face. Compliant with Saudi PDPL and SFDA — every visual here is symbolic, every word is a real patient. BEFORE DAY 1 · CONSULTATION “I wanted something that doesn’t shout.” AFTER · 8 WEEKS DAY 28 · FOLLOW-UP “My sister noticed. Then she booked.” ✦ PATIENT № 247 Day 1 · Day 28 · Day 90 “ I waited three months before booking. I waited 24 hours after the first session to call my sister. — A.M., Khobar Three Hydrafacial sessions · Dr. Marina Naddaf ✦ PATIENT № 392 Day 1 · Day 14 “ My mother came with me to the first visit. By the third, she had booked her own. — R.K., Khobar Filler · Dr. Doaa Goda All testimonials shared with written consent. Names withheld at patient request — Saudi privacy by default. Visual plates are symbolic compositions, never patient photographs. Results vary by person, treatment, and follow-through. SEE THE FULL GALLERY →
— A.M., Khobar Three Hydrafacial sessions · Dr. Marina Naddaf
— R.K., Khobar Filler · Dr. Doaa Goda

sections.heading: Reach us today.
sections.text: ✦ ONE DESTINATION. ONE NUMBER. Reach us today. Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Road · Al Hada · Al Khobar · Saturday – Thursday 9 AM – 11 PM · Friday after Asr. Same-day WhatsApp confirmation. BOOK ON WHATSAPP CALL 920024428

sections.heading: ✦ Frequent questions
sections.text: ✦ FREQUENT QUESTIONS We've got answers. Short answers to the questions we hear most. Don't find yours? Message us on WhatsApp. WHATSAPP US What departments do you offer? − Ten specialty departments under one roof: dermatology and laser, plastic and aesthetic surgery, cosmetic dentistry and maxillofacial, OB/GYN, paediatrics, bariatric surgery, day surgery, interventional radiology, psychiatry, and a dedicated laser center. Where are you located? + How do I book? + What should I expect on my first visit? + What are your hours? + Do you offer female-only sessions? + Do you accept Tabby and Tamara? +
